permissions.commentary: CC-BY-4.0 expressly excludes patent and trademark rights from the license (Section 2(b)(2)). The license neither grants nor forbids patent use; it simply does not address patent rights, so any patent claims remain with their holders.

conditions.commentary: CC-BY-4.0 has no share-alike requirement. Adapted Material may be released under any license provided the Adapter's License does not prevent recipients from complying with this Public License (Section 3(a)(4), s-120).
